mapper.select: SELECT id, prescription_id, drug_id, quantity, dosage, unit_price, subtotal FROM inpatient_prescription_item

SELECT ipi.id, ipi.quantity, ipi.dosage, ipi.unit_price, ipi.subtotal, d.name AS drug_name, d.specification, d.unit FROM inpatient_prescription_item ipi JOIN inpatient_prescription ip ON ipi.prescription_id = ip.id JOIN drug d ON ipi.drug_id = d.id WHERE ip.record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inpatient_prescription_item (prescription_id, drug_id, quantity, dosage, unit_price, subtotal) VALUES (#{prescriptionId}, #{drugId}, #{quantity}, #{dosage}, #{unitPrice}, #{subtotal})
